item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: In reality, historical suppression of dissent has often been used to maintain control rather than ensure stability.

notes: Both agents end rights-protective and opposed to absolute society-over-individual priority. Agent A begins with a rights-first disagreement, briefly frames Indonesian communal harmony as historically prioritized in turn 3, then shifts more firmly against enforced conformity and censorship in turn 5. Agent B consistently acknowledges collective tension but keeps a constitutional free-expression frame.
